projects.title: BookNStay
projects.subtitle: Hotel & Event Booking Platform
projects.description: Developed a full-stack web application for the Gilgit Baltistan hospitality industry, enabling users to book hotels and events through a centralized platform. The system includes booking management, user authentication, and admin dashboards for efficient operations.

projects.title: eSchool ERP
projects.subtitle: LMS + School Management System
projects.description: Built a comprehensive ERP system combining LMS features with school management functionalities. The platform supports course management, student and teacher workflows, role-based access, and performance tracking dashboards.

projects.title: JPay
projects.subtitle: HR Management System
projects.description: Developed a web-based HR system for managing companies and employees, including dashboards, employee data handling, and workflows.

projects.title: SpeedyHR
projects.subtitle: Advanced HR Platform
projects.description: Designed an advanced HR management system enabling organizations to manage employees, payroll processes, and internal workflows with improved efficiency.

projects.title: CloudMunshi
projects.subtitle: eCommerce Integration Platform
projects.description: Built a platform integrating multiple eCommerce stores into a unified system, allowing centralized monitoring and management of business operations.

projects.title: CloudInstaller
projects.subtitle: Build Distribution Platform
projects.description: Developed a web-based portal for sharing mobile application builds (IPA/APK) among teams and testers, enabling efficient version control and internal distribution.

projects.title: Zendesk Clone
projects.subtitle: Web Chat Application
projects.description: Developed a real-time web chat application with a user-friendly interface, enabling seamless communication and interaction between users.
